headline: Kabupaten Pekalongan flood update for January 2026
summary: Banjir di Kabupaten Pekalongan disrupted mobility on key road links selama periode peninjauan terbatas.
summary_id: Banjir di Kabupaten Pekalongan disrupted mobility on key road links selama periode peninjauan terbatas.
